scripts.pack: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:signed: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --mac
scripts.mas:dev: npm run mas:check -- --dev && npm run build:web && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --mac mas-dev
scripts.mas:dist: npm run mas:check -- --dist && npm run build:web && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --mac mas

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: SynchroPage can attach user-selected images. Camera access is only used if a future capture workflow explicitly requests it.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SynchroPage can support voice input in the agent composer when enabled by the user.
extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: SynchroPage reads and writes only documents selected by the user.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: SynchroPage may export workspace backups to a location selected by the user.
